name: Construct Mapping Review for Non-LLM CR Augmentation Update
summary: The staged records map the construct carefully: Lun and Bonthu are short-answer text augmentation, Krisnawati combines manually simulated text responses with feature-space SMOTE, and Li/Haudek/Krajcik is adjacent non-text constructed-response evidence. The claim update explicitly separates generated textual student responses from manual simulation, feature vectors, and image augmentation.

findings.claim_or_issue: SMOTE/image augmentation examples are relevant to sparse constructed-response scoring data but are not generated readable student prose.
findings.why_it_matters: The literature review should not imply that every included synthetic-data method creates synthetic student text.
findings.recommended_action: Maintain the response-origin and synthetic-data-form distinction in downstream synthesis text.
